Headline: 111th/Throop Temporary Reroute near 111th/Throop
ShortDescription: 111 King Dr/111th rr EB via 119th, Ashland, 115th & Halsted; WB via 111th, Halsted, 115th, Marshfield, then into terminal due to construction nr 111th/Throop.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#111 King Drive/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions. Buses will operate as follows:

Eastbound buses will operate via 119th, Ashland, 115th, Halsted, then resume their normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via 111th, Halsted, 115th, Marshfield, then into the terminal.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 111th/Throop.

Headline: Howard-bound Red Line Service Delayed near 47th
ShortDescription: Howard-bound Red Line trains are standing near 47th due to a mechanical problem. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Howard-bound Red Line trains are standing near 47th due to a mechanical problem.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Reroute near Harrison/Racine
ShortDescription: 60 Blue Island/26th buses temporarily rerouted due to, street blockage near Harrison/Racine.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#60 Blue Island/26th buses temporarily rerouted due to, street blockage near Harrison/Racine.

Westbound buses will operate via Harrison, Morgan, Van Buren, Racine and over normal route.

Eastbound buses will operate via Racine, Jackson, Morgan, Harrison and over normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.
